title: gaura coccinea var. epilobioides
intro: Gaura coccinea var. epilobioides, also known as the scarlet bee blossom or Colorado bee blossom, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues and wounds. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to relieve congestion, soothe sore throats, and promote skin healing. Gaura coccinea var. epilobioides can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional herbal medicine.
